# mihari_policy (Resource)

Manages a Mihari alert policy with escalation steps.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mihari_policy" "critical" {
  name        = "Critical Alert Policy"
  type        = "template"
  retry_count = 3
  retry_delay = 5

  steps = [
    {
      wait_before       = 0
      call              = false
      push_notification = true
      sms               = false
      email             = true
      members = [
        { type = "current_persons_on_call" }
      ]
    },
    {
      wait_before       = 5
      call              = true
      push_notification = true
      sms               = true
      email             = true
      members = [
        {
          type = "user"
          id   = "user-uuid-here"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the alert policy.
- `retry_count` (Number) Number of retries before escalating (1-20).
- `retry_delay` (Number) Delay between retries in minutes (1-60).
- `steps` (Attributes List) Escalation steps (1-10). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps))

### Optional

- `type` (String) Policy type: template or default.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) UUID of the policy.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--steps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps`

Required:

- `call` (Boolean) Enable phone call notification.
- `email` (Boolean) Enable email notification.
- `members` (Attributes List) Members to notify (1-20). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--steps--members))
- `push_notification` (Boolean) Enable push notification.
- `sms` (Boolean) Enable SMS notification.
- `wait_before` (Number) Minutes to wait before this step (0-60).

<a id="nestedatt--steps--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `steps.members`

Required:

- `type` (String) Member type: user, current_persons_on_call, or teams.

Optional:

- `id` (String) Member UUID. Required when type is 'user'.
